title: ama-shea-whipped-butter
brief: Ama Shea is a luxury African shea butter skincare brand rooted in Ghanaian heritage, founded by a West African woman bringing her grandmother's traditional shea butter recipes to the modern beauty market. Hero product is the Pure Whipped Shea Body Butter — handcrafted in small batches from raw unrefined shea nuts sourced from women's cooperatives in Northern Ghana. No parabens, no synthetic fragrance. Visual tone: warm golden amber lighting, earthy textures, raw ingredients on dark wood, West African textiles, golden hour skin close-ups. Premium but grounded — luxury that feels handmade, not factory. Brand story: From her hands to yours.
